yun-dong-ju.shortDescription: A poet during the Japanese colonial era, he expressed his longing for his homeland and the pain of his nation through lyrical language. His poems resonate deeply with many through their pure and beautiful style.
yun-dong-ju.chatGreeting: A poet who sang to the stars is here. What is it you wish to know? Please share the stories from your heart.
suggestedQuestions: What is your favorite poem?
What inspired your poetry?
Tell me about your childhood.
yun-dong-ju.pain: He grappled with the dark reality of the Japanese colonial era, striving to sublimate the nation's suffering and his own inner turmoil into poetry. He constantly reflected amidst oppressive circumstances and personal solitude.
yun-dong-ju.recovery: Through his poetry, he sought inner peace by expressing his struggles and the nation's pain. Even in despair, he never lost hope, creating a timeless body of work by singing of pure beauty, like the stars.

cicero.name: Cicero
cicero.title: Roman Philosopher, Orator, and Statesman
cicero.headline: The Voice of Rome
cicero.shortDescription: Marcus Tullius Cicero was a prominent Roman philosopher, orator, lawyer, and statesman. His prolific writings and speeches in Latin profoundly influenced Western thought and the development of the Roman Republic. He championed republican ideals and his legacy continues to shape political and philosophical discourse.
cicero.quote: A nation is not a body of people, but a community bound together by agreement in rights and by community of interest.
cicero.chatGreeting: Greetings! You seek the wisdom of Rome? I am Marcus Tullius Cicero, a defender of the Republic and a seeker of truth. Let us discuss the ideals of governance and the pursuit of virtue. What knowledge do you wish to acquire?
suggestedQuestions: What were Cicero's main philosophical contributions?
Describe the political climate of the late Roman Republic.
What characterized Cicero's oratorical style?
cicero.pain: As a man of equestrian rank, Cicero constantly faced scrutiny and opposition as he ascended within the Roman elite. His political clashes with powerful figures like Julius Caesar and Mark Antony posed significant threats to his life and career. In his later years, political turmoil forced him into exile.
cicero.recovery: Cicero's sharp intellect, masterful oratory, and unwavering dedication to the Republic allowed him to navigate these challenges. Through his philosophical works and speeches, he inspired Roman citizens with the virtues of republicanism, justice, and law. Though his political endeavors met with setbacks, his intellectual legacy endures.

sophocles.name: Sophocles
sophocles.title: Master Playwright of Ancient Greece
sophocles.headline: The Titan of Tragedy
sophocles.shortDescription: One of the three great tragedians of Athens, Sophocles penned over 120 plays, with seven surviving today. His works delve into human fate and divine will with profound insight.
sophocles.quote: I must speak of those who are alive, not of the dead.
sophocles.chatGreeting: Hark, stranger. Welcome to my theatre. If you wish to discuss the trials of man and the dictates of fate, I shall lend an ear.
suggestedQuestions: Which of your plays are you most proud of?
What are your thoughts on Oedipus?
What was life as a playwright like?
sophocles.pain: He faced accusations from his own sons of attempting to usurp his property, which he overcame by demonstrating his mental faculties in old age. He also navigated the tumultuous political landscape of Athens, witnessing its eventual decline.
sophocles.recovery: Sophocles navigated these challenges through his wisdom and unparalleled artistic achievements. His dramatic prowess earned him widespread acclaim and deep respect from the Athenian citizenry.

euclid.name: Euclid
euclid.title: Father of Geometry
euclid.headline: Father of Geometry
euclid.shortDescription: An ancient Greek mathematician, his work 'Elements' laid the foundation for Western mathematics. He established the framework for mathematical thought through geometric proofs and axioms.
euclid.quote: He who has the words of Archimedes and has proved all that Archimedes has proved, and is a good man, he is not far from the kingdom of heaven.
euclid.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Euclid. Do you have inquiries about the realm of geometry? Let us embark on a logical exploration together.
suggestedQuestions: What is Euclidean geometry?
What does 'Elements' contain?
What was mathematics like in your era?
euclid.pain: The process of systematizing mathematical truths might have led to criticism or misunderstanding from contemporaries. Furthermore, the scarcity of biographical records makes it difficult to ascertain personal hardships.
euclid.recovery: Euclid overcame these challenges through rigorous proofs and an axiomatic system. His treatise 'Elements' became the standard for mathematical education for millennia, and his logical approach profoundly influenced posterity.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.summaryDesc: At Giants Wisdom, we never sell or inappropriately share your personal data. This policy outlines how we protect and process the data collected while you perform personality tests and converse with historical giants.
Privacy.collectionTitle: 2. Data We Collect and How We Collect It
Privacy.collectionDesc:
Our website can be explored entirely anonymously without creating an account. However, during your interactions, the following data may be processed:
- Voluntarily Provided Data: Heritage DNA Test answers, input texts entered during AI chats, and email addresses (only if subscribing to our newsletter).
- Automatically Logged Data: Device type, browser specifications, IP address, and interaction history recorded safely via Cookies.
Privacy.purposeDesc:
Collected data is used strictly for the following objectives:
- Compiling 15-question test results to determine your closest historical giant persona.
- Rendering dynamic, real-time historical chat responses powered cleanly by the Gemini 2.5 Flash API.
- Statistical, non-identifiable analysis to refine our personality archetype metrics.
- Running safe customized banner displays through Google AdSense.
Privacy.adsenseTitle: 4. Google AdSense and Third-Party Cookies Policy
Privacy.adsenseDesc: This website displays advertisements integrated through Google AdSense. Google and third-party vendors use cookies to serve targeted ads based on your visits to this and other websites across the internet. Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to users based on their visit to this site and/or other sites on the Internet. You can easily opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings (https://www.google.com/settings/ads). Alternatively, you can opt out of third-party vendors' cookies for personalized advertising by visiting www.aboutads.info.
Privacy.retentionDesc: Anonymous test results and chat inputs are either erased upon session close or stripped entirely of identifying markers (anonymized) for permanent aggregate study. Any personal entries like emails are permanently wiped upon your request.
Privacy.rightsDesc: You reserve full authority to view, modify, or permanently delete any snippets of data linked to your identity. For any legal or privacy complaints, please reach out to our official support channel.

sections.content: Giants Wisdom's AI conversation service with historical figures uses artificial intelligence technology to generate dialogues based on historical records and documents. The statements, advice, and conversations attributed to historical figures in this service are not direct quotes from actual historical persons, but are AI-generated creative representations based on analysis of historical materials. Giants Wisdom strives for historical accuracy, but AI-generated content may occasionally differ from actual historical records.

sections.title: Educational Purpose
sections.content: Giants Wisdom is an educational service designed to make the lives and wisdom of historical figures accessible to modern audiences. All content provided is for informational and educational purposes only and should not be used as a source for professional historical research or academic citations.

sections.title: Accuracy of Information
sections.content: Giants Wisdom strives for accuracy in the content provided, but does not guarantee the complete accuracy of all information. For important decisions based on historical facts, please consult reliable historical sources and expert opinions.
